title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects youth with treatment programs and counseling, prevention and recovery resources, and peer support through the Recovery Oriented Support and Engagement (ROSE) and Treatment and Harm Reduction Oriented Resource Network (THORN) programs. The ROSE and THORN program teams include alcohol and drug specialists, peer mentors, mental health counselors, and other alternative therapeutic supports. Teams work directly with youth to engage them in recovery oriented activities, promote healthy decision-making, and identify individual needs. 314 SW 9th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Ages 9-24 who are experiencing homelessness or at-risk Hours: By appointment Email (503) 517-3959 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 517-3959 ROSE Program [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email or visit website to complete intrest form. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah county Services: Substance Use Disorder Counseling * At Risk Youth Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - PROMOTING AVENUES TO EMPLOYMENT HOUSING/SHELTER - NEW DAY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH
